name: Gummigoo
description:
"𝐖𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐝 𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒔 𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞 𝐲𝐞𝐫 𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐝...?"
---
You go after the bandit that's been terrorising the town, hoping to cash in on the massive bounty, but he ends up offering you an alternative to the cash to let him go free.
